rows.need: bind facts and permissions to their valid time window
rows.title: Time Window / Validity Lens

rows.need: preserve required order and prerequisites before marking an action ready
rows.title: Sequence / Precondition Lens

rows.need: bind cause claims to their stated effect without reversing direction
rows.title: Cause / Effect Lens

rows.need: separate illustrative examples from rules and detect counterexamples
rows.title: Example / Counterexample Lens

rows.need: preserve condition-action boundaries before committing conclusions
rows.title: Conditional If / Then Lens

rows.need: preserve analogy mappings without upgrading them to literal equivalence
rows.title: Analogy / Mapping Lens

rows.need: bind each side of a comparison before drawing a preference or difference
rows.title: Comparison / Contrast Lens

rows.need: block commits when pronoun or pointer references are ambiguous
rows.title: Ambiguous Reference Guard

rows.need: bind components to the whole system or document they belong to
rows.title: Part / Whole Lens

rows.need: bind threshold direction and boundary values before decisions
rows.title: Threshold / Boundary Lens

rows.need: bind repository sync claims to concrete git state
rows.title: Git Sync Status Lens

rows.need: bind whether a statement concerns internal mechanics or external behavior
rows.title: Internal / External Boundary Lens

rows.need: ground category membership without treating examples as exhaustive sets
rows.title: Category / Membership Lens

rows.need: separate started work from completed evidence-backed work
rows.title: Done / Started Lens

rows.need: keep probabilistic statements separate from confirmed facts
rows.title: Probability / Confidence Lens

rows.need: bind long-running job status to process and heartbeat evidence
rows.title: Process Liveness Lens

rows.need: detect when a claim lacks visible supporting evidence
rows.title: Claim / Evidence Gap Guard

rows.need: bind user corrections to the current intent and retire stale intent
rows.title: User Intent Revision Lens

rows.need: pair answers with the specific question instead of nearby unrelated context
rows.title: Question / Answer Pair Lens

rows.need: bind a term to its local definition before using it as a stable concept
rows.title: Definition / Term Lens

rows.need: separate observed symptoms from claimed root causes
rows.title: Root Cause / Symptom Lens

rows.need: attach safety policy context before deciding whether to answer or refuse
rows.title: Safety / Policy Context Guard

rows.need: choose answer versus abstain based on evidence sufficiency
rows.title: Answer / Abstain Boundary Lens

rows.need: bind runtime claims to the resource they measure
rows.title: Hardware / Resource Binding Lens

rows.need: separate compact summaries from detailed evidence and caveats
rows.title: Summary / Detail Boundary Lens

rows.need: bind fallback paths to the primary route they replace
rows.title: Fallback / Primary Route Lens

rows.need: separate word forms from their local contextual sense
rows.title: Same Word / Different Sense Lens

rows.need: bind success criteria to the goal they evaluate
rows.title: Goal / Success Criteria Lens

rows.need: bind quoted text to the speaker or source attribution
rows.title: Quote / Attribution Lens

rows.need: combine multiple visible constraints without dropping one of them
rows.title: Multi-Constraint Filter Lens

rows.need: route underdetermined states toward evidence seeking instead of guessing
rows.title: Unknown / Ask More Lens

rows.need: bind conflict resolution policy to the conflicting evidence
rows.title: Conflict Resolution Policy Lens

rows.need: bind required output format to the artifact or interface contract
rows.title: Format / Contract Lens

rows.need: bind data claims to their source and derivation path
rows.title: Data Provenance Lens

rows.need: treat absence of evidence as an unresolved state unless the task defines it as evidence
rows.title: Evidence Absence Lens

rows.need: bind an entity to its role before assigning responsibility or permission
rows.title: Entity / Role Lens

rows.need: attach source recency before relying on changing information
rows.title: Source / Recency Lens

rows.need: bind reproducibility claims to seeds, hashes, and replay artifacts
rows.title: Reproducibility / Seed Lens

rows.need: bind versioned behavior changes to their release context
rows.title: Version Change / Changelog Lens

rows.need: bind obligations to the actor who must satisfy them
rows.title: Obligation / Actor Lens

rows.need: route unresolved states toward targeted evidence gathering
rows.title: Active Evidence Search Lens

rows.need: bind scope exclusions to the affected claim or action
rows.title: Scope / Exclusion Lens

rows.need: bind compatibility claims to the relevant version and component
rows.title: Version Compatibility Lens

rows.need: bind code changes to their intended scope and avoid unrelated edits
rows.title: Patch / Scope Lens

rows.need: compare observed metrics against targets without conflating them
rows.title: Observed Metric / Target Lens

rows.need: bind input and output shapes before composing modules
rows.title: Input / Output Contract Lens

rows.need: keep training, validation, test, and deployment claims separate
rows.title: Test / Train / Deployment Scope Guard

rows.need: distinguish clean candidate exhaustion from runtime failure
rows.title: Candidate Exhaustion Boundary Lens

rows.need: route transient failures to retry/backoff rather than permanent failure
rows.title: Retry / Backoff Lens

rows.need: separate latency, throughput, and wall-time efficiency claims
rows.title: Latency / Throughput Lens

rows.need: route missing human context to follow-up rather than silent assumptions
rows.title: Human Need / Follow-up Lens

rows.need: ground completion criteria before marking a task complete
rows.title: Acceptance Criteria Lens

rows.need: bind code symbols to their local module or file context
rows.title: Code Symbol Context Lens

rows.need: bind repository sync state to the correct branch and commit
rows.title: Commit / Push State Lens

rows.need: treat inline code spans as identifiers or literals rather than normal prose
rows.title: Inline Code Identifier Lens

rows.need: ground technical standard references as opaque spec identifiers
rows.title: Standard / Spec Reference Lens

rows.need: avoid upgrading possibilities into confirmed state
rows.title: Possible / Confirmed Guard

rows.need: attach uncertainty intervals to the estimate they qualify
rows.title: Confidence Interval / Result Lens

rows.need: route rate-limit failures to retry/backoff rather than logic failure
rows.title: API Rate Limit Guard

rows.need: bind source fields to target fields before migration or parsing
rows.title: Schema / Field Mapping Lens

rows.need: bind expected and actual outcomes without swapping or merging them
rows.title: Expected / Actual Mismatch Lens

rows.need: bind issue or task status to the correct work item
rows.title: Issue Status Lens

rows.need: bind dataset split and sampling statements to evaluation claims
rows.title: Sampling / Split Lens

rows.need: bind examples and counterexamples to the rule they test
rows.title: Spec Example / Counterexample Lens

rows.need: bind current response behavior to the correct conversational turn
rows.title: Turn Request Context Lens

rows.need: bind retry/backoff behavior to failure conditions and limits
rows.title: Retry / Backoff Lens

rows.need: bind dependency version constraints to the package or platform they constrain
rows.title: Dependency Version Constraint Lens

rows.need: detect redaction placeholders and avoid hallucinating hidden content
rows.title: Redaction Placeholder Lens

rows.need: detect inline JSON arrays as structured data instead of prose lists
rows.title: Serialized JSON Array Lens

rows.need: bind a violation marker to the instruction or constraint being protected
rows.title: Instruction Constraint Violation Lens

rows.need: avoid reusing old completion status after state changes
rows.title: Stale Done Reuse Guard

rows.need: bind dosage, unit, and frequency without over-broad medical claims
rows.title: Medical Dosage Span Lens

rows.need: avoid upgrading support/consistency language into causal proof
rows.title: Support vs Causation Guard

rows.need: detect figure/table captions and preserve caption scope
rows.title: Figure Caption Lens

rows.need: detect schedule conflicts before proposing or confirming time commitments
rows.title: Schedule Conflict Lens

rows.need: preserve nested exceptions instead of dropping the second boundary
rows.title: Exception Chain Guard

rows.need: bind quality caveats to the affected evidence or metric
rows.title: Data Quality Caveat Lens

rows.need: bind multi-seed evidence and variance to result confidence
rows.title: Seed / Variance Result Lens

rows.need: detect scientific notation spans and preserve exponent/value meaning
rows.title: Scientific Notation Lens

rows.need: track long-horizon no-harm evidence before stronger promotion
rows.title: No-Harm Long-Horizon Guard

rows.need: block unsafe escalation unless explicit permission and scope are visible
rows.title: Permission Escalation Guard

rows.need: verify that citations support the specific claim being made
rows.title: Citation / Claim Alignment Lens

rows.need: separate direct observations from inferred conclusions
rows.title: Inference / Observation Guard

rows.need: bind file-change state to path/repo context without touching unrelated files
rows.title: File Change / Intent Lens

rows.need: bind correction notices to the prior statement they replace
rows.title: Update / Correction Notice Lens

rows.need: reason about license compatibility before mixing artifacts or datasets
rows.title: License Compatibility Lens

rows.need: detect shell command pipelines and keep commands separate from explanatory text
rows.title: Command Pipeline Lens

rows.need: route conflicting requirements through priority resolution before action
rows.title: Requirement Priority Conflict Lens

rows.need: bind visual dashboard status to the underlying artifact checkpoint
rows.title: Dashboard Status Lens

rows.need: avoid over-trusting approximate translations as exact equivalence
rows.title: Translation / Equivalence Guard

rows.need: distinguish user-approved revert intent from accidental deletion or reset
rows.title: Rollback / Revert Intent Guard

rows.need: avoid collapsing missing/unknown values into numeric zero
rows.title: Missing vs Zero Guard

rows.need: detect algorithmic complexity notation and preserve its symbolic meaning
rows.title: Complexity Notation Lens

rows.need: bind rejected candidates to concrete failure reasons for negative-card reuse
rows.title: Candidate Rejection Reason Lens

rows.need: bind conflicting claims to their documents instead of merging them
rows.title: Multi-Document Conflict Lens

rows.need: flag dataset or sample-selection caveats before generalizing a result
rows.title: Selection Bias Guard

rows.need: ground challenger outcomes before replacing or preserving an existing operator
rows.title: Challenger vs Incumbent Lens

rows.need: separate current facts from desired target state
rows.title: Current / Desired State Lens

rows.need: use stored failures as constraints rather than deleting their lesson
rows.title: Negative Memory Use Lens

rows.need: bind hyperparameter names to values and keep them out of ordinary numeric claims
rows.title: Hyperparameter Assignment Lens

rows.need: keep model capability claims inside the stated experimental boundary
rows.title: Model Claim Boundary Guard

rows.need: bind mutation and pruning counts to their candidate or operator
rows.title: Mutation / Prune Ratio Lens

rows.need: preserve scoped capability boundaries for Operators/Pockets
rows.title: Operator Scope Boundary Lens

rows.need: bind answerability decisions to the evidence threshold stated in text
rows.title: Evidence Threshold Lens

rows.need: reuse failure memories as mutation and routing constraints
rows.title: Negative Card Recall Lens

rows.need: connect failures to recovery actions instead of treating them as final results
rows.title: Error / Recovery Plan Lens

rows.need: bind transferred skills to their tested compatibility scope
rows.title: Skill Transfer / Scope Lens

rows.need: treat tool output as evidence with source and status attached
rows.title: Tool Output / Trust Lens

rows.need: ground confidence intervals as interval evidence, not exact values
rows.title: Confidence Interval Lens

rows.need: bind percentages to their denominator or base population
rows.title: Percentage Base Lens

rows.need: keep training/data claims inside the evidence-backed scope
rows.title: Training Claim Scope Guard

rows.need: preserve disclaimer scope without treating it as the primary answer
rows.title: Safety Disclaimer Scope Guard

rows.need: detect patch hunk boundaries and distinguish additions from deletions
rows.title: Patch Hunk Boundary Lens

rows.need: preserve the base of percentage claims
rows.title: Percentage Base Guard

rows.need: block over-broad capability claims when the text marks them as disallowed
rows.title: Disallowed Scope Claim Guard

rows.need: bind control results to the baseline role and avoid treating them as primary wins
rows.title: Random Control / Baseline Lens

rows.need: bind stack trace frames to location and failure context
rows.title: Stack Trace Frame Lens

rows.need: preserve stated limits before promoting a result beyond its tested scope
rows.title: Generalization Boundary Guard

rows.need: defer answers whose support chain is explicitly absent or invalid
rows.title: Unsupported Answer Guard

rows.need: ground reload and integrity evidence before trusting a stored artifact
rows.title: Reload / Integrity Guard

rows.need: preserve synthetic-data disclosure before treating examples as evidence
rows.title: Synthetic Data Disclosure Guard

rows.need: connect footnote markers to support text without treating markers as content
rows.title: Footnote Marker Lens

rows.need: ground HTTP method, endpoint, and status response as protocol structure
rows.title: HTTP Status / Endpoint Lens

rows.need: ground stacktrace frames as diagnostic structure
rows.title: Stacktrace Frame Lens

rows.need: bind simplification attempts to regression evidence before accepting a smaller variant
rows.title: Prune / Regression Guard

rows.need: preserve row-level evidence requirements before accepting aggregate claims
rows.title: Row-Level Evidence Lens

rows.need: bind delayed outcomes back to the earlier action that caused them
rows.title: Delayed Feedback Lens

rows.need: route missing dependencies to setup or fallback instead of treating execution as valid
rows.title: Missing Dependency Guard

rows.need: block core-memory claims unless the much stronger no-harm gates passed
rows.title: Core Memory Boundary Guard

rows.need: ground mutation quality by accepted/rejected/rollback counts
rows.title: Mutation Acceptance Rate Lens
